title: ruttya speciosa
intro: Ruttya speciosa, also known as the Malabar nut or Java almond, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruttya speciosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the seeds of Ruttya speciosa are often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
